title: Kortix manifest
description: kortix.toml / kortix.yaml — combined schema covering every published `kortix_version`. Dispatches to the v1, v2, or v3 shape by `kortix_version`. Prefer this URL when the version is not known ahead of time; pin `https://kortix.com/schema/kortix.v3.schema.json` when possible when it is.

connectors.description: An allowlist of names, or the "all" / "none" sentinel.

agentMdFrontmatter.description: OpenCode behavior for one agent — lives in .kortix/opencode/agents/<name>.md frontmatter, never in the manifest. Provided here as an authoring aid; not itself part of kortix.yaml.
